onboarding.title: Welcome to Terrana
onboarding.subtitle: Collect and manage your favorite products, create your own blends and share them with friends.
onboarding.page2Body: Found an interesting product on a website? Copy the relevant text and let the AI do the work. It automatically recognizes all important information, imports it into the designated area of your app and places it in the right categories for you.
onboarding.page3Body: Create and manage your own blends, combinations and protocols – and always keep track of all your creations.
onboarding.hint: Language, Dark Mode and all other settings can be found at any time in the FAQs under Settings.
onboarding.languageHint: You can change the language anytime in Settings.
onboarding.faqHint: You can find all information at any time in the FAQs under Settings.

home.emptyProductsMessage: Add products to see them here.
home.emptyBlendsMessage: Create a blend from your products.

import.title: Import
import.upgradeMessage: You've used your %{limit} free imports. Upgrade to Pro.
import.pasteTip: Copy the relevant text sections from a website, paste them into the Import area and tap 'Import'. The more relevant text you provide, the better the AI recognizes all information and automatically fills in the corresponding fields.

notifications.permissionDenied: Please allow notifications for Terrana in your phone settings to use this feature.

faq.q1: Can I upgrade from Pro to Lifetime later?
faq.a1: Yes, anytime! Your Pro content stays and you get full access to all Lifetime features. Please note that the full Lifetime price applies, as a partial credit is technically not possible.
faq.a3: All your data is stored exclusively on your device. Terrana has no access to your personal data.
faq.a4: If you reinstalled the app or have a new device, you can restore your purchases for free. Tap 'Restore Purchases' in the upgrade screen.
faq.q5: How does the AI import work?
faq.a5: Copy the relevant text sections from a website, paste them into the Import area and tap 'Import'. The more relevant text you provide, the better the AI recognizes all information and automatically fills in the corresponding fields.
faq.q6: Where can I find the upgrade options?
faq.a6: You can view all upgrade options in the Terrana upgrade screen.
faq.a7: With Backup & Restore you can export your entire collection – all products, blends and settings – as a file and store it safely. On a new device or after a reinstall, you restore everything with a single tap. Backup & Restore is an exclusive Lifetime feature. As a Lifetime user, you will receive a weekly reminder if you have enabled notifications from Terrana in the settings.
faq.q8: How do I activate the backup reminder?
faq.a8: The backup reminder is an exclusive Lifetime feature. Make sure you have allowed notifications from Terrana in your phone settings.
